items.title: Cyber-crime increasingly coming with threats of physical violence
items.summary: While hackers used to sneak into computer systems, intimidation of staff is now more common.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Israeli settlers force Palestinian family to exhume and rebury their father
items.summary: The relatives of Hussein Asasa described to NPR how they were forced to exhume and rebury their father when Israeli settlers interfered with his grave.
